installCommand: if [ -d tpo-tracker-backend ]; then cd tpo-tracker-backend && npm install && cd ..; fi; if [ -d tpo-tracker-frontend ]; then cd tpo-tracker-frontend; fi; npm install
buildCommand: if [ -d tpo-tracker-frontend ]; then cd tpo-tracker-frontend && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf dist && cp -R tpo-tracker-frontend/dist dist; else npm run build; fi
